interpretation.next_step: If a deterministic variant improves both first-step done rate and joint velocity, run a full same-seed checkpoint eval for that variant before PPO. Otherwise focus on termination/body target semantics instead of launching a new full PPO training run.

scope: Live IsaacLab gate comparing official reset randomization with deterministic motion reset variants.

interpretation.why_this_matters: This checks whether reset randomization, rather than FK body order alone, is the dominant source of the post-refresh first-step termination and joint-velocity transient.

worker_metrics.scope: Live IsaacLab deterministic-reset gate for robot-order FK tracking.
